simplification_item: S4TWL - Material Number Field Length Extension
title: Material number extended to 40 characters
description: Code assuming MATNR is CHAR18 (offset/length, fixed-length MOVE, hardcoded 18) truncates or mismatches at 40 chars
detect_simpl_items: S4TWL-MATNR-LENGTH,S4TWL - Material Number Field Length Extension

title: Stock quantity fields aggregated into MATDOC
description: Stock quantities no longer persisted in MARD/MARC/MCHB; aggregated from MATDOC and exposed via NSDM compatibility views

title: Add ORDER BY where implicit row order is relied upon
description: On HANA a SELECT without ORDER BY is non-deterministic; code relying on implicit sort (READ BINARY SEARCH, first-row logic) can break

title: FI/CO totals and line-item access redirected to ACDOCA
description: Classic FI/CO totals tables replaced by the Universal Journal (ACDOCA) with compatibility views; direct GLT0/FAGLFLEXT/COEP access must change

title: Customer/vendor master via Business Partner (CVI)
description: Customer/vendor are BP roles; create/change via XD0x/XK0x/legacy FMs must route through BP; direct KNA1/LFA1 reads usually still work but writes must not

simplification_item: S4TWL - Data Model Changes in SD Pricing
title: SD pricing conditions moved to PRCD_ELEMENTS
description: Pricing condition records persisted in PRCD_ELEMENTS instead of KONV; reads should target PRCD_ELEMENTS and conditions must never be written by direct table update
detect_simpl_items: S4TWL-SD-PRICING,S4TWL - Data Model Changes in SD Pricing

simplification_item: S4TWL - Data Model Changes in SD
title: SD status tables VBUK/VBUP eliminated
description: Header/item status fields moved into the document tables (VBAK/VBAP; deliveries LIKP/LIPS; billing VBRK/VBRP); VBUK/VBUP are gone and no like-for-like compatibility views are provided - redirect reads to the document-table status fields (verify per release)
detect_simpl_items: S4TWL-SD-DATAMODEL,S4TWL - Data Model Changes in SD

simplification_item: S4TWL - Data Model in FI (elimination of index tables)
title: FI index tables are read-only compatibility views
description: BSID/BSAD/BSIK/BSAK (AR/AP) and BSIS/BSAS (G/L) eliminated as redundant; same-named read-only compatibility views over BSEG/ACDOCA; writes and append structures no longer possible
detect_simpl_items: S4TWL-FIN-INDEXTABLES,S4TWL - Data Model in FI (elimination of index tables)

simplification_item: S4TWL - Material Document Tables MKPF and MSEG
title: Material documents aggregated into MATDOC
description: MKPF/MSEG replaced by single MATDOC table with compatibility views; reads should target MATDOC, documents created only via goods-movement API
detect_simpl_items: S4TWL-MMIM-MATDOC,S4TWL - Material Document Tables MKPF and MSEG

title: Classic credit management replaced by FSCM
description: FD32/KNKK/KNKA classic credit management not available; redesign onto SAP Credit Management (FIN-FSCM-CR, UKM_BP); functional change with no 1:1 mapping

title: NAST message control superseded by S/4 Output Management
description: NAST/TNAPR/RSNAST00 classic output coexists with BRF+-based S/4 Output Management; OM-enabled document outputs need redesign onto OM forms and determination

title: LIS info structures superseded by CDS embedded analytics
description: Persisted info structures S001..Snnn and statistics updates superseded by real-time CDS analytical views; custom S### reads and LIS updates need redesign

title: Direct DML on tables now read-only compatibility views
description: UPDATE/MODIFY/INSERT/DELETE on standard tables now backed by read-only compatibility views (stock, material docs, pricing, FI index/totals) fails; route writes through the released API
